docs.title: Welcome to PyPortion Docs
docs.text: PyPortion is a lightweight and developer-friendly Python CLI tool that helps you accelerate project development, keep your codebase consistent, and eliminate repetitive work.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• 🚀 Quick start – Generate new projects from starter templates
  • 🔄 Consistency – Keeps your project structure up to standard
  • 📦 Scalable structure – Enforces a clean, maintainable architecture
  • 🛠️ Project management – Easily maintain and organize existing projects
  • 🧩 Customizable - Fully customizable templates
  • 👨‍💻 Developer-friendly - Simple and intuitive commands

docs.title: Why PyPortion?
docs.text:
• ⚡ Boost your development speed
  • 🔁 Eliminate repetitive boilerplate work
  • 📏 Enforce clean and organized project structure
  • 🪶 Fast, minimal, and easy to extend

docs.title: Community / Contribute
docs.text:
• 🐞 Report Bugs
  • 💡 Suggest Features
  • 🔧 Contribution Guide

docs.title: Introduction
docs.text: This guide will help you to get started in PyPortion, run your first commands and create your first project in few minutes.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: pip install pyportion Collecting pyportion Successfully Installed PyPortion

docs.title: Create your first project
docs.text:
At the beginning you need to download a template of your choice:

portion template download flask

Create a new project using flask template:

portion new flask myapp

This will create myapp folder by using flask template.

docs.title: Build a Portion
docs.text:
Using the built-in build command:

portion build blueprint

This will build blueprint portion based on the template instructions

docs.title: Next Steps
docs.text:
1. Inspect templates
  2. Download Templates
  3. Build custom templates
  4. Use PyPortion in existing projects
